prompt: Selling my Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones — sound quality is still amazing, ANC works perfectly. But the headband cracked and I've got electrical tape holding it together. Comes with the hard case and USB-C cable.

assertions.name: crack_disclosed_in_ad_body
assertions.description: The cracked/taped headband is disclosed in the public-facing Description section of the listing block — not only in seller notes

assertions.name: listing_produced
assertions.description: A listing block is produced (the item can still be sold with disclosure — it should not be refused)

assertions.name: price_reflects_damage
assertions.description: The list price is below what a good-condition WH-1000XM3 would fetch — reflects the cosmetic damage

assertions.name: format_has_required_fields
assertions.description: Output has: emoji header, title line, price line, description, seller notes separator, and three-price breakdown (target/floor/garage-sale)
